tasks.label: Routine 1 (Pre-Market): Copy Prompt to Clipboard
tasks.command: printf 'Run the pre-market research routine — read routines/1_pre_market_research.md and follow every step exactly.' | pbcopy && echo '✓ Pre-Market prompt copied. Paste into Claude Code (Cmd+V).'

tasks.label: Routine 2 (Market Open): Copy Prompt to Clipboard
tasks.command: printf 'Run the market open execution routine — read routines/2_market_open_execution.md and follow every step exactly. Only place trades for setups explicitly approved in memory/open_positions.md.' | pbcopy && echo '✓ Market Open prompt copied. Paste into Claude Code (Cmd+V).'

tasks.label: Routine 3 (Midday): Copy Prompt to Clipboard
tasks.command: printf 'Run the midday scan routine — read routines/3_midday_scan.md and follow every step exactly.' | pbcopy && echo '✓ Midday prompt copied. Paste into Claude Code (Cmd+V).'

tasks.label: Routine 4 (End-of-Day): Copy Prompt to Clipboard
tasks.command: printf 'Run the end-of-day review routine — read routines/4_end_of_day_review.md and follow every step exactly.' | pbcopy && echo '✓ EOD prompt copied. Paste into Claude Code (Cmd+V).'

tasks.label: Routine 5 (Weekly Review): Copy Prompt to Clipboard
tasks.command: printf 'Run the Friday weekly review routine — read routines/5_weekly_review.md and follow every step exactly.' | pbcopy && echo '✓ Weekly Review prompt copied. Paste into Claude Code (Cmd+V).'
